word: H3304 - יְפֵה־פִיָּה - yᵉphêh-phîyâh - yef-eh' fee-yaw' - Very fair

sections.paragraph:
Original: יפה־פיּה

Transliteration: yephêh-phı̂yâh

Phonetic: yef-eh' fee-yaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. pretty (reduplication with the force of the diminutive)
    1. fair of mouth (literally)
  2. (CLBL) very beautiful

Origin: from H3302 by reduplication

TWOT entry: 890b

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
